sections.title: Streaming & Content
items: Live TV with channel categories, favorites, and channel management
Movies library with detailed info (cast, director, plot, rating, duration)
Series with seasons, episodes, and auto-next episode with countdown timer
Xtream Codes/XUI.ONE API and 1-Stream API support
TV Archive / Catch-up TV for past programs (Pro+)
Continue Watching with resume from last position
Watch History tracking across all content types
Favorites management for channels, movies, and series
Adult content filtering with PIN protection

sections.title: EPG (Electronic Program Guide)
items: Provider EPG from Xtream Codes / 1-Stream server
Custom EPG sources via XMLTV URLs
OpenEPG integration with 265+ free sources from 60+ countries
EPG Channel Matching UI for manual corrections
7-day EPG grid and list view with current program highlighting
Auto-refresh with configurable intervals (30min to 24hr)
EPG quality analysis and cache statistics

sections.title: Players & Playback
items: 4 player engines: Shaka Player, Video.js, JWPlayer, Bitmovin
Quality selection (Auto, 480p, 720p, 1080p, 4K)
Picture-in-Picture with preservation on channel switch (Pro+)
Playback speed control (0.5x to 2x)
Subtitle and audio track selection
Fullscreen and Theatre mode
Hardware acceleration toggle
Buffer size tuning (Low/Medium/High)
Auto-play with configurable countdown (5-120s)
Stream auto-diagnosis on playback failures

sections.title: User Interface
items: Grid and List view with inline player for live channels
Dark, Light, and System theme with customizable colors
Global search across all content (Ctrl+K)
Keyboard and remote control navigation
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Virtual scrolling for large channel lists
Collapsible sidebar with mobile navigation bar
Toast notifications and notification center

sections.title: Network & Proxy
items: Built-in CORS proxy for seamless streaming
HTTP/HTTPS and SOCKS4/SOCKS5 proxy support with authentication
User Agent selection (VLC, Samsung TV, LG TV, Android, Kodi, Fire TV, TiviMate, and more)
Connection pooling and proxy connection testing
Image proxy with Nginx caching (10GB, 30-day TTL)

sections.title: TMDB & Metadata
items: TMDB integration for movie and series metadata (Pro+)
Automatic poster, backdrop, cast, and trailer fetching
Image cache with configurable max age and size
Configurable TMDB API key with validation

sections.title: Profiles & Modes
items: Multi-profile support with per-profile settings and databases
Self-Service Mode: users manage own server profiles
Managed Mode: admin configures servers, users login with credentials only
Profile status checking (online/offline)
Fingerprint-based profile registry (no credentials stored server-side)

sections.title: Admin Panel (Pro+)
items: Admin dashboard with license overview and system statistics
Real-time system stats via WebSocket (CPU, RAM, Disk, Network)
Custom branding: logo, favicon, app name, colors, footer text
White-label mode for complete rebranding (Enterprise)
Maintenance mode (immediate and scheduled) with custom messages
Managed server management (add/edit/delete/test)
Profile registry overview
System changelog viewer

sections.title: Settings
items: 9 settings sections: Appearance, EPG, Player, Content, Network, Data & Cache, TMDB, Image Cache, About
Per-table cache TTL configuration (channels, VOD, series, EPG, categories)
Database statistics and manual cache clearing
System logs with category filtering, search, and date range

sections.title: Infrastructure
items: Automated installer for Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS, Fedora, Arch, and Alpine
Customer portal for subscription and billing management
PWA with Service Worker and offline-first caching
Integrity system with RSA-signed manifests
